meaning: n.火柴,比赛,竞赛,匹配,(足球,捧球,蓝球)比赛v.相配,相称,比赛,相比,匹配
examples: The match flared and went out.
He was watching a football match.
It was only a friendly match.
England has many artistic landmarks, but few can match the literary cachet of Haworth Village.
Horses watch the few cars speeding past with the attentiveness of spectators at a tennis match.
